subtitle: Honest diagnostics we see that you might not.

merchants.name: Zomato Foods
merchants.summary: Best-performing merchant on the platform. UPI Autopay adoption is ahead of peers by 18 points.
strengths: 94.8% success rate · +0.8pts MoM, best in class
Refund rate 1.2% · healthy for food delivery
observations: UPI Autopay mandate growth is 3× their peer set. Worth a case study.
Still on T+1 settlement — they qualify for T+0 on current plan.

merchants.name: Razorpay Technologies
merchants.summary: Strong fundamentals. Volume growth outpacing infrastructure headroom on ICICI Tuesday windows.
strengths: Highest AOV on the platform · ₹12,400 median
concerns: ICICI NetBanking weekly maintenance is costing ~₹42k/month in missed conversions
observations: Consider switching ICICI-first routing to card-first on Tuesday 15:00–16:00

merchants.name: Nykaa Beauty
merchants.summary: Refund rate has climbed 3× in 14 days. Pattern suggests a catalog issue, not a payments issue.
strengths: Cross-border SEPA success 94% · ahead of peers
concerns: Refund rate 8.4% vs 2.6% platform average — 3× spike in 14 days
Refund reasons cluster: 62% 'wrong size/color' on new skincare sets
First-time customer retention down from 34% to 22%
observations: Check size-chart coverage on SKUs added since 1 April.
Consider holding new-customer orders for manual QC until catalog is cleaned.

merchants.name: Cred Club
merchants.summary: Recovering from late-March promo abuse. Velocity rules are working; base rate is healthy.
strengths: Dispute win rate 89% · strong evidence practice
concerns: Velocity rule triggers elevated 2.4× baseline — promo bot activity suspected
4% of new accounts flagged in first 7 days — up from 1.6%
observations: Promo-abuse pattern will likely recede after 30 April.
Current velocity threshold (4 attempts / 10 min) may be too permissive — recommend tightening to 3 / 10.

merchants.name: Urban Company
merchants.summary: Steady business but routing is UPI-only. One NPCI outage away from material revenue loss.
concerns: Sunday NPCI maintenance window will hit 6% of next week's volume
observations: Enable NetBanking fallback before Sunday. Estimated recovery: ₹42,000 on that window alone.
Considering card fallback for amounts above ₹5,000 would also help.

merchants.name: BookMyShow
merchants.summary: Event-driven volume is spiky but well-managed. Capacity holds through peak drops.
strengths: Low refund rate for entertainment category
concerns: Amex checkout flow has a 14% dropoff at card input — UX issue, not payments
observations: Amex drop-off is pure UX — field validation runs too aggressively, flagging Amex 4-digit CID as invalid.
